# terrible_ibm_storage_virtualize_ibm_svc_manage_portset (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `clustername` (String) The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Specifies the name of portset.
- `state` (String) Creates (`present`) or Deletes (`absent`) the IP portset.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `domain` (String) Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter *clustername*.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `log_path` (String) Path of debug log file.
- `noownershipgroup` (Boolean) Specify to remove the ownership group from portset. Parameters *ownershipgroup* and *noownershipgroup* are mutually exclusive. Applies only during updation of portset.
- `old_name` (String) Specifies the old name of the portset while renaming. Valid when *state=present*, to rename an existing host.
- `ownershipgroup` (String) The name of the ownership group to which the portset object is being mapped. Parameters *ownershipgroup* and *noownershipgroup* are mutually exclusive. Applies when *state=present*.
- `password` (String) REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters *username* and *password* are required if not using *token* to authenticate a user.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `portset_type` (String) Specifies the type for the portset. Applies only during creation of portset. If not specified, *portset_type=host* will be used.
- `porttype` (String) Specifies the type of port that can be mapped to the portset. Applies when *state=present*. If not specified, *porttype=ethernet* will be used to manage IP portset.
- `replicationportsetlinkuid` (String) Change the replication_portset_link_uid parameter of the portset.
- `resetreplicationportsetlinkuid` (Boolean) Reset the replication_portset_link_uid parameter to a newly generated portset link UID.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `token` (String) The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the `ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_auth` module.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `username` (String) REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters *username* and *password* are required if not using *token* to authenticate a user.
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) Validates certification.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
